prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜约第69名（2026年），近年排名稳步上升（2021年第76→2026年第69），学校综合实力持续增强；近年声誉平稳，2022年曾出现学术不端事件但影响已淡化；抖音关注度一般（总排名第75，评价「一般」）；未见明显投档断档记录；作物学A-、植物保护A-、畜牧学A-、草学A-，共4个A-学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等专业社会热度持续偏高，而农林类专业热度一般；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争显著加剧；学校位于陕西省咸阳市，为本省高校，本地招生占比大，对本省考生有天然的地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划小幅扩招及本省物理类考生大幅增加等因素，考生规模增幅远超扩招幅度，竞争加剧是主导力量；在2025年基准23609名基础上预计最低位次后移至约24141名，区间23641–24641名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 19606 → 20139 → 24451 → 19451 → 23609, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, there was a notable backward shift (24451), a sharp recovery to 19451 in 2024, and another backward shift to 23609 in 2025, showing an overall backward trend in the last two years, with a baseline of about 23609 in 2025; the physics category enrollment plan in this province was 1158 in 2021, 1177 in 2022, 1191 in 2023, 1184 in 2024, and 1193 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 1221, a slight expansion of about 2.3% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; approximately 69th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with a steady rise in recent years (76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; reputation has been stable in recent years, with an academic misconduct incident in 2022 but its impact has faded; Douyin attention is average (overall ranking 75th, rated 'average'); no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Crop Science A-, Plant Protection A-, Animal Science A-, Grassland Science A-, totaling 4 A- disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, while agricultural and forestry majors have average popularity; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi Province, as a local university with a large proportion of local enrollment, offering a natural regional preference advantage for local examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a slight expansion in the 2026 plan, and a significant increase in the number of physics category examinees in this province, the growth in examinee numbers far exceeds the expansion rate, making intensified competition the dominant force; based on the 2025 baseline of 23609, the minimum ranking is expected to shift backward to approximately 24141, with a range of 23641–24641.
